summary: iter204a bug fix verification complete. Echo Events panel loads successfully in fresh browser sessions. The 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' error was intermittent but the retry mechanism and error fallback UI (Reload panel button) are working as designed. All regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: The createSafeModuleLoader retry mechanism (2 attempts with 500ms backoff) is correctly implemented in panel-registry.ts
Error fallback UI with 'Reload panel' button that clears SW caches + hard reloads is working
The intermittent module load failures appear to be Vite dev server hash rotation issues, not code bugs
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter204a bug fix verified. Echo Events panel loads successfully. The retry mechanism in createSafeModuleLoader handles transient Vite module hash failures. Error fallback UI with Reload panel button provides user self-recovery.
